text: 这个地方太大了，走过的路很容易忘记。
column5: #texten:This place is too big — easy to forget the paths I've taken.

text: 我应该把路线和发现记录下来。
column5: #texten:I should record the routes and discoveries.

text: 万一之后还要回来，或者有人来接应，这些笔记会有用的。
column5: #texten:If I need to come back, or someone comes to find me, these notes will help.
